license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.hipb4dn
title: Modified total RNA extraction for Heterosigma akashiwo using the Qiagen RNeasy kit
author: Monica Accerbi

steps_raw.instruction: Starting material: 1 ml culture with about 400,000 cells
To the cells add 1 ml of Buffer RLT with 10 µl β-mercaptoethanol
Centrifuge through a QIAshredder column (750 µl at a time) at 11,000 rpm for 1’ and collect FT (flow through) in a 5 ml tube
To the collected FT add 2 ml of 70% (v/v) ethanol and mix at room temperature
Centrifuge through a RNeasy spin column (750 µl at a time) at 11,000 rpm for 1’ and discard FT
Add 750 µl Buffer RW1 and centrifuge at 11,000 rpm for 1’ and discard FT
Wash column with 500 µl Buffer RPE, centrifuge at 11,000 rpm for 1’ and discard FT
Centrifuge once more at 11,000 rpm for 1’ to dry the membrane and remove residual ethanol
Elute total RNA with 15 µl DEPC (Diethyl pyrocarbonate) -treated H 2 O
Total RNA yield using this method is around 350 ng with 260:280 nm > 1.8

Centrifuge the starting material at 2,000 to 3,000 rpm for 2’ at room temperature Discard supernatant and resuspend pellet in the residual liquid, about 1 ml Proceed as above, steps 1 to 9. Elute total RNA with 25-30 µl DEPC-treated H2O
